response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with ~16 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, but the role demands Director-level IC stature with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and strategic advisory capability with executives and large customers. The resume shows hands-on craftsmanship and small-scale open source work rather than the industry recognition, AI depth, or large-org strategic influence expected at the Principal/Director IC level.
strengths: ~16 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling
Track record of founding open source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and delivering public talks/workshops
concerns: No demonstrated Principal/Director-level scope — titles top out at Staff/Senior with team-level rather than org-wide impact
Lacks recognized AI expertise, published AI products at scale, or advanced AI-related degree
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or driving cloud/AI strategy in large organizations

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI strategy and recognized expertise
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
Recent hands-on AI agent / MCP tooling experience
